home.subtitle: We provide safe, fast, and low-cost smart contract flash exchange service, making your cryptocurrency exchange more convenient
home.safeAndReliableDesc: Based on smart contract technology, all transactions are transparent on the blockchain, no trust required, ensuring your asset security
home.fastExchangeDesc: Automatically trigger contract exchange, funds real-time arrival, no waiting, experience instant exchange service
home.lowCostDesc: Only 1 TRX fee per exchange, much lower than traditional exchanges, saving your transaction costs
home.smartContractDesc: Automatically trigger contract exchange, no manual intervention, ensuring fairness and transparency of transactions
home.transparentDesc: All transaction records are visible on the blockchain, the platform does not earn any exchange rate spreads, ensuring transparent and fair transactions
home.support247Desc: Professional customer service team is always ready to help you, answer your questions, ensure your transactions go smoothly
home.howItWorksDesc: Learn about our TRON network energy rental service process, and how the smart contract flash exchange platform safely and quickly completes USDT-TRX exchange
home.energyQuickRentalDesc: Our TRON chain energy rental service provides you with flexible energy resources to meet your transaction needs
home.chooseTransactionCount: Choose the appropriate transaction count based on your upcoming transactions
home.transferToAddress: Transfer the corresponding amount of TRX to the energy rental address provided by the platform
home.systemAutoInject: System automatically injects the corresponding energy resources into your wallet address
home.smartContractFlash: Smart Contract Flash Exchange Process Explained
home.smartContractFlashDesc: This smart contract flash exchange is a decentralized USDT-TRX instant exchange on TRON chain, using smart contract technology, automatically trigger contract exchange, automatically return exchange tokens
home.usdtToTrx: When the payment wallet transfers USDT to the flash exchange wallet, it triggers the contract. After automatic exchange, TRX is returned with fee deducted, then transferred to the payment wallet.
home.trxToUsdt: When the payment wallet transfers TRX to the flash exchange wallet, the fee is deducted, then the contract is triggered. After automatic exchange, USDT is returned and transferred to the payment wallet.

fee.title: Fee Description
fee.subtitle: Understand our fee structure to ensure clarity and transparency for every transaction
fee.usdtBandwidthFee: USDT Transfer Energy and Bandwidth Fee
fee.usdtNote: When returning USDT, if the payment wallet USDT is not 0, 3TRX is charged; if USDT is 0, 6TRX is charged (for purchasing energy)
fee.slippageNote: There will be slippage less than 0.01 during transactions, actual transaction prevails, this platform does not earn any exchange rate spreads
fee.minAmount: Due to low amount flash exchange is not cost-effective, minimum exchange amount: USDT ≥ 10; TRX ≥ 30. Below this amount will be deducted transfer fee and returned
fee.transparentNote: All fees and exchange rates are visible on the blockchain, ensuring transparent and fair transactions

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quickly understand our services and FAQ
faq.whatIsEnergyRental: What is Smart Contract Instant Swap?
faq.whatIsEnergyRentalAns: Smart Contract Instant Swap is an automated token exchange service powered by blockchain smart contract technology. When you transfer tokens to a designated address, the smart contract automatically triggers the swap process and returns the converted tokens to you. The entire process is secure, transparent, and requires no manual intervention.
faq.howToUseRental: How to use the Instant Swap service?
faq.howToUseRentalAns:
Using our service is simple:
1. Select your swap direction on this platform (USDT→TRX or TRX→USDT).
2. Confirm the swap amount and the estimated tokens you will receive.
3. Transfer your tokens to the instant swap address provided by the platform.
4. Wait for the smart contract to automatically process and return your tokens.
faq.rentalValidity: How long does a transaction take?
faq.rentalValidityAns: Generally, the smart contract completes the process and returns the tokens within 1 minute of receiving the transfer. However, processing times may be longer due to TRON network congestion or other factors.
faq.feeCalculation: How do I confirm my transaction is complete?
faq.feeCalculationAns:
You can confirm your transaction status through the following methods:
1. Check your wallet balance for the received tokens.
2. Search your transfer records on the TRON blockchain explorer.
3. View the transaction history page on this platform.
faq.problemsSupport: What if there is a problem with my transfer?
faq.problemsSupportAns:
If you encounter any issues (e.g., tokens not received), please contact us via:
1. Our Telegram customer support bot: {'@'}GasVipBot
2. Provide your transaction hash (TXID) and relevant details.
3. Our support team will resolve the issue for you as soon as possible.
